title: Schema for data solution code generation (v2.1).
description: Standardized format for the metadata required to generate data logistics (ETL) and object creation (DDL) for Data Solutions such as a Data Warehouse or Data Lake. The intent is to decouple how individual software stores Data Solution Automation metadata from how this metadata is exchanged with other components, technologies, and solutions for data processing and structure generation.

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional identifier for the Data Object Mapping List.

name.title: Name
name.description: Optional name of the Data Object Mapping List.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Free-format notes on the Data Object Mapping List.

dataObjectMappings.title: Data Object Mappings
dataObjectMappings.description: The list of source-to-target mappings between Data Objects.

classifications.title: Classifications
classifications.description: Classifications applied to the Data Object Mapping List.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Key/Value pair extensions on the Data Object Mapping List.

templateMappings.title: Template Mappings
templateMappings.description: Template references that apply to the Data Object Mapping List.

dataObjectMapping.title: Data Object Mapping
dataObjectMapping.description: An individual mapping between one or more source Data Objects and a target Data Object.

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional unique identifier for the Data Object Mapping.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the Data Object Mapping. Ideally unique within the list.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Free-format notes on the Data Object Mapping.

sourceDataObjects.title: Source Data Objects
sourceDataObjects.description: One or more source Data Objects. A Data Object may represent a stored table or a query expression (when queryCode is set).

targetDataObject.title: Target Data Object
targetDataObject.description: The target Data Object of the mapping.

relatedDataObjects.title: Related Data Objects
relatedDataObjects.description: Data Objects related to the mapping for purposes other than the source/target relationship - for example lookups, merge joins, or lineage.

relationships.title: Relationships
relationships.description: Relationships defined on the mapping (parent/child, foreign keys, lookups, etc.).

dataItems.title: Data Items
dataItems.description: Data Items specifically associated with this mapping, used as sources or targets in the mapping or its business key component mappings.

dataItemMappings.title: Data Item Mappings
dataItemMappings.description: The collection of individual column-to-column mappings.

businessKeyDefinitions.title: Business Key Definitions
businessKeyDefinitions.description: Business Key(s) defined for the Data Object Mapping.

filterCriterion.title: Filter Criterion
filterCriterion.description: Optional filter applied to the source-to-target mapping.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Indicates whether this mapping is enabled.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Key/Value pair extensions on the mapping.

templateMappings.title: Template Mappings
templateMappings.description: Template references that apply to this mapping.

dataObject.title: Data Object
dataObject.description: A table, file, view, query, or similar data entity. When queryCode is set, the Data Object represents a query expression (view, script, or procedure) rather than a stored table.

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional identifier for the Data Object.

dataConnection.title: Data Connection
dataConnection.description: Connection information for the Data Object.

dataItems.title: Data Items
dataItems.description: Data Items belonging to this Data Object.

queryCode.title: Query Code
queryCode.description: When set, the Data Object represents a query expression rather than a stored table.

businessKeyDefinitions.title: Business Key Definitions
businessKeyDefinitions.description: Business Key definitions on the Data Object, allowing a business key to be defined once on a source and reused across mappings.

classifications.title: Classifications
classifications.description: Classifications applied to the Data Object.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Key/Value pair extensions on the Data Object.

templateMappings.title: Template Mappings
templateMappings.description: Template references that apply to this Data Object.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Free-format notes on the Data Object.

dataItem.title: Data Item
dataItem.description: A column or attribute of a Data Object. When queryCode is set, the Data Item represents a calculated column rather than a stored one.

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional identifier for the Data Item.

numericPrecision.title: Numeric Precision
numericPrecision.description: Total digits in a numeric value.

numericScale.title: Numeric Scale
numericScale.description: Digits to the right of the decimal point.

ordinalPosition.title: Ordinal Position
ordinalPosition.description: Position of the item within its parent Data Object.

isPrimaryKey.title: Is Primary Key
isPrimaryKey.description: Indicates whether this item is part of a Primary Key.

isNullable.title: Is Nullable
isNullable.description: Indicates whether this item accepts null values.

queryCode.title: Query Code
queryCode.description: When set, the Data Item represents a calculated column expression rather than a stored value.

classifications.title: Classifications
classifications.description: Classifications applied to the Data Item.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Key/Value pair extensions on the Data Item.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Free-format notes on the Data Item.

dataItemMapping.title: Data Item Mapping
dataItemMapping.description: A mapping between one or more source Data Items and a target Data Item.

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional identifier for the Data Item Mapping.

name.title: Name
name.description: Optional name for the Data Item Mapping.

sourceDataItems.title: Source Data Items
sourceDataItems.description: Source Data Items for the mapping. A Data Item may represent a column or a query expression (when queryCode is set).

targetDataItem.title: Target Data Item
targetDataItem.description: Target Data Item of the mapping.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Key/Value pair extensions on the Data Item Mapping.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Free-format notes on the Data Item Mapping.

dataItemMappingRef.title: Data Item Mapping Reference
dataItemMappingRef.description: A lightweight, identifier-based variant of a Data Item Mapping for use inside a Relationship. References Data Items by id rather than embedding them.

sourceDataItemIds.title: Source Data Item Ids
sourceDataItemIds.description: Identifiers of the source Data Items.

targetDataItemId.title: Target Data Item Id
targetDataItemId.description: Identifier of the target Data Item.

dataConnection.title: Data Connection
dataConnection.description: Connection information that can be used by a Data Object. Typically a key, token, reference, or connection string.

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional identifier for the Data Connection.

classifications.title: Classifications
classifications.description: Classifications applied to the Data Connection.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Key/Value pair extensions on the Data Connection.

templateMappings.title: Template Mappings
templateMappings.description: Template references that apply to this Data Connection.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Free-format notes on the Data Connection.

businessKeyDefinition.title: Business Key Definition
businessKeyDefinition.description: Defines how a business key is composed from one or more components, each referencing a Data Item.

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional identifier for the Business Key Definition.

name.title: Name
name.description: Optional name of the Business Key Definition.

ordinalPosition.title: Ordinal Position
ordinalPosition.description: Position of this business key definition within its parent mapping (relevant for Links with multiple business keys).

businessKeyComponents.title: Business Key Components
businessKeyComponents.description: Components of the business key. The order of components is meaningful and is recorded on each component.

businessKeyComponentMappings.title: Business Key Component Mappings (legacy)
businessKeyComponentMappings.description: Legacy pre-v2.1 representation of business key components as Data Item Mappings. Retained for backward-compatible reading; new files should use businessKeyComponents.

surrogateKey.title: Surrogate Key
surrogateKey.description: Optional label for the resulting business key attribute.

classifications.title: Classifications
classifications.description: Classifications applied to the Business Key Definition.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Key/Value pair extensions on the Business Key Definition.

businessKeyComponent.title: Business Key Component
businessKeyComponent.description: An individual component of a Business Key Definition, referencing a Data Item.

ordinalPosition.title: Ordinal Position
ordinalPosition.description: Position of this component within the parent business key.

dataItem.title: Data Item
dataItem.description: The Data Item that forms this component of the business key.

relationship.title: Relationship
relationship.description: A relationship from one Data Object to another. Supports lineage relationships (parent/child), foreign keys, and sub/supertypes.

cardinality.title: Cardinality
cardinality.description: Cardinality of the relationship, expressed as min/max ranges on each end.

relatedDataObjectId.title: Related Data Object Id
relatedDataObjectId.description: Identifier-only reference to the related Data Object. Use when the object is defined elsewhere in the file.

relatedDataObject.title: Related Data Object
relatedDataObject.description: Embedded related Data Object. Use when carrying the full object inline.

dataItemMappings.title: Data Item Mappings
dataItemMappings.description: Foreign-key style Data Item mappings, expressed as identifier references.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Key/Value pair extensions on the relationship.

cardinality.title: Cardinality
cardinality.description: Captures the cardinality and ordinality of a relationship via min/max ranges on each end.

name.title: Name
name.description: Optional name for a recognised cardinality construct, e.g. "one-to-one", "one-to-many".

cardinalityRange.title: Cardinality Range
cardinalityRange.description: A min/max range used for one end of a Cardinality. For example {"min": "1", "max": "N"} expresses "at least one, possibly many".

min.title: Minimum
min.description: Lower bound of the range. Typically "0" or "1".

max.title: Maximum
max.description: Upper bound of the range. Typically "1" or "N".

dataClassification.title: Data Classification
dataClassification.description: A free-form label/category that can be applied to schema objects to drive generation logic.

classification.title: Classification
classification.description: The classification value. Usually a keyword used for automation purposes.

group.title: Group
group.description: Grouping or category for this classification (e.g. "Solution Layer", "Logical", "Physical").

scope.title: Scope
scope.description: Scope areas in which this classification applies. When null or empty, applies everywhere. Values are camelCase tokens such as "dataObjects", "connections", "mappings", "templates", "graph".

extension.title: Extension
extension.description: A free-form key/value pair for additional context that is not part of the standard schema.

key.title: Key
key.description: The Key in the Key/Value pair.

value.title: Value
value.description: The Value in the Key/Value pair.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Optional notes explaining the intent of the extension.

templateMapping.title: Template Mapping
templateMapping.description: A reference to a template file that should be applied to the parent object. Lets metadata travel with the templates used to generate code from it.

templateFileName.title: Template File Name
templateFileName.description: The file name of the template to apply.
